# Vexlo — AI Receptionist & Missed Call Automation for UK Trades & Clinics

## About
Vexlo helps UK trade businesses and clinics stop losing jobs to missed calls. Our AI bot texts back every missed call within 4 seconds, books the appointment automatically, and chases Google reviews after every job — 24/7, no staff needed.

First month is completely free. No contracts. No setup fees.

## Core Services
- Missed call text-back (AI responds within 4 seconds, 24/7)
- Automated appointment booking (self-booking link via SMS)
- Google review request automation (sent after every completed job)
- Real-time lead notifications
- Custom AI messaging (written to match your business tone)
- Full GHL dashboard with lead and revenue tracking

## Who We Serve
Vexlo is built for UK service businesses that rely on inbound calls:
- Roofers
- Plumbers
- Electricians
- Kitchen fitters
- Dental practices
- Salons and barbers
- Estate agents
- Physiotherapy and wellness clinics
- Cleaning companies
- Property maintenance businesses
- Any trade or service business that misses calls while working
